title: Market Intelligence in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger market intelligence in practice judgment so strategy work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Market Intelligence in Practice is a leverage point inside strategy. It supports the broader goal of vision, positioning, competitive analysis, and strategic planning.
coreConcepts: Market Intelligence in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good market intelligence in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Market Intelligence in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
